data.name: Severity_Critical
data.value: Critical

data.name: Severity_Warning
data.value: Warning

data.name: Severity_Info
data.value: Info

data.name: Severity_Pass
data.value: Pass

data.name: Audit_NotInstalled
data.value: {0} is not installed on this system.

data.name: Audit_Outdated
data.value: {0} version {1} is installed. The latest known version is {2}. Outdated software may have unpatched security vulnerabilities.

data.name: Audit_UpToDate
data.value: {0} version {1} is installed and appears to be current.

data.name: Audit_Disabled
data.value: {0} is disabled.

data.name: Audit_Enabled
data.value: {0} is enabled.

data.name: Audit_DisabledByPolicy
data.value: {0} is disabled via policy.

data.name: Firewall_ProfileDisabled
data.value: Windows Firewall ({0} profile) is disabled. This leaves the system exposed to network attacks.

data.name: Firewall_ProfileEnabled
data.value: Windows Firewall ({0} profile) is enabled.

data.name: Firewall_AllProfilesEnabled
data.value: Windows Firewall is enabled on all profiles (Domain, Private, Public).

data.name: Defender_RealTimeDisabled
data.value: Windows Defender real-time protection is disabled. The system is not actively scanning for malware.

data.name: Defender_RealTimeEnabled
data.value: Windows Defender real-time protection is enabled.

data.name: Defender_SignaturesStale
data.value: Defender signatures are {0} days old. Signatures older than 7 days may miss recent threats.

data.name: Defender_TamperProtectionOff
data.value: Defender Tamper Protection is disabled. Malware can modify or disable Defender settings.

data.name: Update_Stale
data.value: Windows has not been updated in {0} days. Systems more than {1} days behind on patches are at elevated risk.

data.name: Update_Paused
data.value: Windows Update is paused. The system will not receive security patches until updates are resumed.

data.name: Update_Current
data.value: Windows is up to date. Last successful update: {0}.

data.name: Account_GuestEnabled
data.value: The Guest account is enabled. Guest accounts provide unauthenticated access and should be disabled.

data.name: Account_PasswordNeverExpires
data.value: Account '{0}' has password set to never expire.

data.name: Account_AdminSprawl
data.value: {0} local accounts have administrator privileges. Minimize admin accounts to reduce attack surface.

data.name: Browser_DangerousExtensions
data.value: {0} known-dangerous browser extension(s) found.

data.name: Browser_ExcessivePermissions
data.value: {0} browser extension(s) have potentially dangerous permissions.

data.name: Browser_SafeBrowsingOff
data.value: {0} Safe Browsing / SmartScreen is disabled. Phishing and malware protection is inactive.

data.name: Browser_AutoUpdateDisabled
data.value: {0} auto-update is disabled via policy. The browser will not receive security patches automatically.

data.name: Browser_SavedPasswords
data.value: Passwords are saved in {0}. Browser-saved passwords are vulnerable to local attacks and data breaches.

data.name: Network_SMBv1Enabled
data.value: SMBv1 is enabled. SMBv1 is deprecated and has critical vulnerabilities (EternalBlue). Disable it immediately.

data.name: Network_LLMNREnabled
data.value: LLMNR is enabled. LLMNR is vulnerable to hash capture attacks on the local network.

data.name: Network_NBTNSEnabled
data.value: NetBIOS over TCP/IP (NBT-NS) is enabled. NBT-NS is vulnerable to name resolution spoofing.

data.name: Service_UnquotedPath
data.value: Service '{0}' has an unquoted path containing spaces: {1}. This is a privilege escalation vector.

data.name: Service_WeakDacl
data.value: Service '{0}' has a weak DACL allowing non-admin modification.

data.name: Encryption_BitLockerOff
data.value: BitLocker is not enabled on volume {0}. Data on this volume is not encrypted at rest.

data.name: Encryption_NoTPM
data.value: No TPM 2.0 module detected. BitLocker may require alternative authentication methods.

data.name: PowerShell_TranscriptionOff
data.value: PowerShell transcription logging is not enabled. Post-exploitation activity may not be recorded.

data.name: PowerShell_AMSIDisabled
data.value: AMSI (Antimalware Scan Interface) appears to be disabled or tampered with.

data.name: PowerShell_Unrestricted
data.value: PowerShell execution policy is set to Unrestricted. Consider using RemoteSigned or AllSigned.

data.name: USB_AutoRunEnabled
data.value: AutoRun is enabled for removable media. Malware can auto-execute when USB devices are inserted.

data.name: Privacy_AdvertisingIdEnabled
data.value: Windows advertising ID is enabled. Apps can track you across sessions using this identifier.

data.name: Privacy_DiagnosticDataFull
data.value: Diagnostic data is set to Full. Consider reducing to Required (Basic) for better privacy.

data.name: Remote_RDPNoNLA
data.value: RDP is enabled without Network Level Authentication. This allows unauthenticated access to the login screen.

data.name: Remote_RDPEnabled
data.value: Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) is enabled. Ensure it is protected by strong authentication and firewall rules.

data.name: Score_Format
data.value: Score: {0}/100 (Grade {1})

data.name: Score_Summary
data.value: Critical: {0} | Warning: {1} | Info: {2}

data.name: Fix_DryRunHeader
data.value: DRY RUN — the following changes would be applied:

data.name: Fix_ApplyPrompt
data.value: Apply this fix? [y/N]

data.name: Fix_Applied
data.value: Fix applied successfully.

data.name: Fix_Skipped
data.value: Fix skipped.

data.name: Fix_Failed
data.value: Fix failed: {0}

data.name: Fix_ElevationRequired
data.value: This fix requires administrator privileges. Please run as admin.

data.name: Compliance_CIS_L1
data.value: CIS Windows Level 1

data.name: Compliance_CIS_L2
data.value: CIS Windows Level 2

data.name: Compliance_SOC2
data.value: SOC 2

data.name: Compliance_HIPAA
data.value: HIPAA

data.name: Compliance_Essential8
data.value: Essential Eight
